title: Diagnostic criteria for schizophrenia
paperName: Paper 3 - Specialist Options: Approaches, Issues and Debates
summary: 9990 Clinical — DSM-5/ICD-11 criteria, symptoms, and reliability of schizophrenia diagnosis.
learningObjectives: Outline positive and negative symptoms of schizophrenia.
Compare DSM-5 and ICD-11 diagnostic criteria.
Evaluate reliability and validity of diagnosis.
Discuss cultural bias in classification systems.

simpleExplanation.title: When reality fractures
simpleExplanation.summary: Schizophrenia involves disturbances in thought, perception, and behaviour — diagnosis relies on symptom clusters and duration rules in classification manuals.

sections.content: **Schizophrenia diagnosis** (1.1.1) opens Clinical Psychology. Know **symptom types** and **classification debates**.
